  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (ε := 1) (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  have hlpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos (E := {t | IsLinftyAP 1 t f}) (l := l) hl

  rcases hz with ⟨x₀, hx₀, rfl⟩
  refine ⟨‖f x₀‖ + 1, ?_⟩
  intro x
  rcases hl x with ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
  have hyIcc : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l := ⟨hy.1.le, hy.2.le⟩
  have hxyap : IsLinftyAP (ε := 1) (t := x + y) f := hxy
  have hx₀Icc : x₀ ∈ Set.Icc (-l) l := hx₀
  have hx₀yIcc : x₀ + y ∈ Set.Icc (-l) (2 * l) := by
    constructor
    · have : (-l) + 0 ≤ x₀ + y := add_le_add hx₀Icc.1 hyIcc.1
      simpa [add_zero] using this
    · have : x₀ + y ≤ l + l := add_le_add hx₀Icc.2 hyIcc.2
      simpa [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
  have hUC' := hUC (ε := 1) (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  have hdist : dist (x - (x + y)) 0 < 1 := by
    simpa [dist_eq_norm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (by
        have : ‖(-y : ℝ)‖ < 1 := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ y := hyIcc.1
          have : y < l := hy.2
          have : y < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hlpos)
          simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg this] using this
        simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_neg] using this)
  have hbound_step : ‖f x - f (x + y)‖ ≤ 1 := by
    simpa [IsLinftyAP] using hxyap x
  have hmax_on : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (-l) l, ‖f t‖ ≤ ‖f x₀‖ := by
    intro t ht
    have : f t ∈ f '' Set.Icc (-l) l := ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩
    have := hmax this
    simpa using this
  have hx₀y_le : ‖f (x₀ + y)‖ ≤ ‖f x₀‖ := by
    have hx₀yIcc' : x₀ + y ∈ Set.Icc (-l) l := by
      constructor
      · exact hx₀Icc.1.trans (by simpa using add_le_add_right hyIcc.1 x₀)
      · have : x₀ + y ≤ l := by
          exact (add_le_add hx₀Icc.2 hyIcc.2).trans_eq (by ring)
        exact this
    exact hmax_on (x₀ + y) hx₀yIcc'
  have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f (x + y)‖ + 1 := by
    have := norm_sub_le_iff_le_add'.1 hbound_step
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
  have hxyp : ‖f (x + y)‖ ≤ ‖f x₀‖ := by

classical
  have hRD : IsRelDense {t | IsLinftyAP 1 t f} := hf (ε := 1) (by norm_num)
  rcases hRD with ⟨l, hl⟩
  have hlpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos (E := {t | IsLinftyAP 1 t f}) hl
  have hlne : l ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hlpos
  let I : Set ℝ := Set.Icc 0 l
  have hcont : ContinuousOn f I := (hf.uniformContinuous).continuous.continuousOn
  have hcomp : IsCompact I := isCompact_Icc
  rcases (hcomp.image_of_continuousOn hcont).isBounded with ⟨C, hC⟩
  refine ⟨C + 1, ?_⟩
  intro x
  have hxmod : x - l * Real.floor (x / l) ∈ Set.Ico 0 l := by
    simpa [Real.sub_floor_div_mul_eq] using
      (Real.fract_mem_Ico (x / l) |> (by
        simpa [Real.fract, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
          mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, inv_mul_eq_iff_eq_mul₀, hlne]))
  have hxI : x - l * Real.floor (x / l) ∈ I := by
    exact ⟨hxmod.1.le, hxmod.2.le⟩
  have hxAP : IsLinftyAP 1 (l * Real.floor (x / l)) f := by
    rcases hl (l * Real.floor (x / l)) with ⟨y, hyIco, hy⟩
    have : y = x - l * Real.floor (x / l) := by
      have : l * Real.floor (x / l) + y = x := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hy
      linarith
    have hy' : IsLinftyAP 1 y f := by simpa using hyIco.2
    simpa [this] using hy'
  have h1 : ‖f x - f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))‖ ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using hxAP (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))
  have h2 : ‖f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))‖ ≤ C := by
    exact hC (by
      refine ⟨x - l * Real.floor (x / l), ?_, rfl⟩
      exact hxI)
  have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f x - f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))‖ + ‖f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))‖ := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc] using
      (norm_add_le (f x - f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))) (f (x - l * Real.floor (x / l))))
  have : ‖f x‖ ≤ 1 + C := by
    have := le_trans this (add_le_add h1 h2)
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
  linarith

  have hcont : Continuous f := huc.continuous
  rcases (Complex.norm_eq_abs (f 0)).ge with _h0
  rcases (huc 1 (by norm_num)) with ⟨δ, hδpos, hδ⟩

    intro x hx
    have hx' : dist x 0 < 1 := by
      have : dist x 0 ≤ δ := by
        simpa [Real.dist_eq, abs_of_nonneg (by linarith [hx.1, hx.2])] using hx.2
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt this (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact hδpos) (le_of_lt (by linarith)))
    have := hδ x 0 hx'
    have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + ‖f x - f 0‖ := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (norm_add_le (f 0) (f x - f 0))
    have h1 : ‖f x - f 0‖ ≤ 1 := by
      simpa [dist_eq_norm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm] using this
    have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      exact le_trans this (add_le_add_left h1 _)
    exact this
  have hcomp : IsCompact (f '' Set.Icc (-δ) δ) :=
    (isCompact_Icc.image hcont)
  rcases hcomp.exists_forall_ge_norm with ⟨C, hC⟩
  refine ⟨max C (‖f 0‖ + 1), ?_⟩
  intro x
  by_cases hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (-δ) δ
  · have : ‖f x‖ ≤ C := by
      have : f x ∈ f '' Set.Icc (-δ) δ := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hC _ this
    exact le_trans this (le_max_left _ _)
  · have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have : x ∈ Set.Icc (-δ) δ := by
        classical
        by_contra hx'
        exact hx hx'
      exact hbd x this
    exact le_trans this (le_max_right _ _)

classical
  rcases hf (ε := (1 : ℝ)) (by norm_num) with ⟨l, hl⟩
  have hlpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos (E := {t | IsLinftyAP (1 : ℝ) t f}) (l := l) hl
  obtain ⟨t, ht, htmem⟩ := hl 0
  have ht0 : 0 ≤ t := ht.1
  have htl : t < l := ht.2
  have htAP : IsLinftyAP (1 : ℝ) t f := htmem
  have hUC : UniformContinuous f := IsUnifAlmostPeriodic.uniformContinuous (f := f) hf
  have hcont : Continuous f := hUC.continuous
  have hcomp : IsCompact (f '' Set.Icc 0 l) := (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l)).image hcont
  rcases (hcomp.isBounded).norm.image (fun z : ℂ => z) with ⟨C, hC⟩
  refine ⟨C + ‖f 0‖ + 1, ?_⟩
  intro x
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := hl x
  have hyIcc : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l := by
    refine ⟨hy.1, hy.2.le⟩
  have hbound_on : ‖f y‖ ≤ C := by
    have : f y ∈ f '' Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l := ⟨y, hyIcc, rfl⟩
    exact hC this
  have hx0 : x + y - y = x := by ring
  have hxAP : ‖f (x + y) - f x‖ ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
    simpa [IsLinftyAP] using htAP x
  have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f (x + y)‖ + 1 := by
    have := norm_sub_le (f (x + y)) (f x)
    linarith [this, hxAP]
  have : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f (x + y)‖ + (‖f 0‖ + 1) := by
    linarith
  have hxy' : x + y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l := by
    have : x + y = (x + y) := rfl
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · have : 0 ≤ x + y := by
        have := add_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_nonneg (by linarith [hy.1]) hy.1
        exact this
      exact this
    · have : x + y ≤ l := by
        have := le_trans (by linarith [hy.2.le]) (le_rfl : l ≤ l)
        exact this
      exact this
  have hbound_xy : ‖f (x + y)‖ ≤ C + ‖f 0‖ := by
    have : ‖f (x + y)‖ ≤ C := by
      have : f (x + y) ∈ f '' Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l := ⟨x + y, hxy', rfl⟩
      exact hC this
    linarith
  linarith
